'''Snapfish''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Fish/Legends|fish]] that was native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. They typically preyed upon [[bottle bug]]s, leaping out of the [[Water/Legends|water]] in which they lived to catch them.<ref name="Shatter" />

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}}
